subcodes.first_line: O thou wanderer in the path of God! Give thanks that thou hast forsaken thine own comfort and tranquility, becoming a wayfarer in that land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره راه خدا شکر کن که از راحت و آسایش خویش گذشتی و سرگشته در آن کشور و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @nearness and remoteness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @living waters; water of life
